mapper.select: SELECT id, enabled, max_failed_count AS maxFailedCount, lock_minutes AS lockMinutes, updated_by AS updatedBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM login_risk_policy WHERE id = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE login_risk_policy SET enabled = #{enabled}, max_failed_count = #{maxFailedCount}, lock_minutes = #{lockMinutes}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = 1
